ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the software package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the package is distributed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the package was first added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the package */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer responsible for maintaining the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_maintainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintainer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the package */,
  "distribution" TEXT /* Linux distribution this version is for */,
  "backported" INTEGER /* Indicates if this version is backported */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "security_patch" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the version includes security patches */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_distribution FOREIGN KEY ("distribution") REFERENCES distributions ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the developer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the developer's information */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the developer is currently active */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer (e.g., maintainer, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version that was changed */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer who approved the change */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was approved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signoffs" (
  "signoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sign-off event */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version that was signed off */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer who signed off */,
  "signoff_date" TEXT /* Date when the sign-off occurred */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer who approved the sign-off */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the sign-off was approved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sign-off was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signoffs_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signoffs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signoffs_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution */,
  "distribution_name" TEXT /* Name of the Linux distribution */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the Linux distribution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the distribution was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the distribution */,
  "support_end_date" TEXT /* Date when support for the distribution ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, maintainer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user's information */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the package */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the package */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conflicts" (
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conflict */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package with the conflict */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version causing the conflict */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conflict */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the conflict */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the conflict was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the conflict */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer who resolved the conflict */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the conflict was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conflict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflicts_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflicts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflicts_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)
